Image is missing alt attribute

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body> <style>v\:image { behavior:url(#default#VML); display:inline-block }</style> <xml:namespace ns="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml" prefix="v"></xml:namespace> <style media="screen" type="text/css">
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="title"> <a href="https://www.ka.no/sak/article/1877191"> Har startet arbeidet med statsbudsjettet for 2027 </a> </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="system-search-input-box" has_input="0" id="view_3404377____q" name="view_3404377____q" onblur="if (this.value== '') { $(this).attr('has_input', 0); } " onfocus="systemFocus(this);$(this)
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="ui-button-search icon-search" href="" id="view_3404377____submit_link" onclick="if (window.top.$('#view_3404377____q').attr('has_input') != 1) { return false; };systemSubmitElements(this, 'c
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="cs-toolbar-link" href="" onclick="window.top.Cornerstone.SignInV2('https://www.ka.no/_graphql', 'toolbar_button', 'reload', '', 'reload', '', {"system":{"authenticationTitle&q
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="cs-toolbar-link" href="" onclick="Cs.toolbar.hide();return false;" target=""><span class="cs-toolbar-link-content"><span class="cs-toolbar-icon"></span></span></a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div onclick="Cs.toolbar.show();" onmouseout="this.style.backgroundImage='url(https://d1nizz91i54auc.cloudfront.net/_static/images/toolbar_cube_flat.svg)';" onmouseover="this.style.backgroundImage='ur
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element has onmouseover without keyboard equivalent

<div onclick="Cs.toolbar.show();" onmouseout="this.style.backgroundImage='url(https://d1nizz91i54auc.cloudfront.net/_static/images/toolbar_cube_flat.svg)';" onmouseover="this.style.backgroundImage='ur
Add keyboard event handlers (onfocus, onblur, onkeydown) for equivalent functionality
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element has onmouseout without keyboard equivalent

<div onclick="Cs.toolbar.show();" onmouseout="this.style.backgroundImage='url(https://d1nizz91i54auc.cloudfront.net/_static/images/toolbar_cube_flat.svg)';" onmouseover="this.style.backgroundImage='ur
Add keyboard event handlers (onfocus, onblur, onkeydown) for equivalent functionality

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="cs-toolbar-link" href="" onclick="Cs.toolbar.hide();return false;" target=""><span class="cs-toolbar-link-content"><span class="cs-toolbar-icon"></span></span></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="system-search-input-box" has_input="0" id="view_3669125____q" name="view_3669125____q" onblur="if (this.value== '') { $(this).attr('has_input', 0); } " onfocus="systemFocus(this);$(this)
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (48 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="ui-button-search icon-search" href="" id="view_3669125____submit_link" onclick="if (window.top.$('#view_3669125____q').attr('has_input') != 1) { return false; };systemSubmitElements(this, 'c
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="cs-toolbar-link" href="" onclick="Cs.toolbar.hide();return false;" target=""><span class="cs-toolbar-link-content"><span class="cs-toolbar-icon"></span></span></a>
Add href attribute or use a button element

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (179 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="item2" href="/om/dette-er-ka" role="menuitem" tabindex="1">Dette er KA</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

SERIOUS

Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

<body>

Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>

Nettverk for kirkebyggforvaltere

https://www.ka.no/nettverk/nettverk-for-kirkebyggforvaltere

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="logo" href="/"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="ui-button-search icon-search" href="" id="view_4425863____submit_link" onclick="if (window.top.$('#view_4425863____q').attr('has_input') != 1) { return false; };systemSubmitElements(this, 'c
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://webportal.ka.no/Course/Main/CourseDetails?courseid=d4efbada-b546-f011-877a-000d3ab075c1" target="_blank">i 2026 finner denne sted i Larvik 22.-23. oktober</a>

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="cs-toolbar-link" href="" onclick="Cs.toolbar.hide();return false;" target=""><span class="cs-toolbar-link-content"><span class="cs-toolbar-icon"></span></span></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="system-search-input-box" has_input="0" id="view_4425863____q" name="view_4425863____q" onblur="if (this.value== '') { $(this).attr('has_input', 0); } " onfocus="systemFocus(this);$(this)
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="mm-email" name="email" size="25" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'name' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="mm-name" name="name" size="25" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)

MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (179 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="item2" href="/om/dette-er-ka" role="menuitem" tabindex="1">Dette er KA</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="item2" href="/om/kontakt" role="menuitem" tabindex="1">Kontakt</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Medlemsfordeler i KA

https://www.ka.no/medlemskap-i-ka/medlemsfordeler

Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="logo" href="/"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="ui-button-search icon-search" href="" id="view_3669262____submit_link" onclick="if (window.top.$('#view_3669262____q').attr('has_input') != 1) { return false; };systemSubmitElements(this, 'c
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://webportal.ka.no/Products/Product?productId=111d1249-984b-e311-9401-005056b6158b" target="_blank">Du kan laste ned heftet som pdf her.</a>

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="cs-toolbar-link" href="" onclick="Cs.toolbar.hide();return false;" target=""><span class="cs-toolbar-link-content"><span class="cs-toolbar-icon"></span></span></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

<body> <style>v\:image { behavior:url(#default#VML); display:inline-block }</style> <xml:namespace ns="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml" prefix="v"></xml:namespace> <style media="screen" type="text/css">

Start your heading structure with h1

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="cs-toolbar-link" href="" onclick="Cs.toolbar.hide();return false;" target=""><span class="cs-toolbar-link-content"><span class="cs-toolbar-icon"></span></span></a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div onclick="Cs.toolbar.show();" onmouseout="this.style.backgroundImage='url(https://d1nizz91i54auc.cloudfront.net/_static/images/toolbar_cube_flat.svg)';" onmouseover="this.style.backgroundImage='ur
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element has onmouseover without keyboard equivalent

<div onclick="Cs.toolbar.show();" onmouseout="this.style.backgroundImage='url(https://d1nizz91i54auc.cloudfront.net/_static/images/toolbar_cube_flat.svg)';" onmouseover="this.style.backgroundImage='ur
Add keyboard event handlers (onfocus, onblur, onkeydown) for equivalent functionality
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 2 pages]
Avvik: 13 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text (×39 across article pages)

<img alt="" class="image-element" height="599" src="https://d1nizz91i54auc.cloudfront.net/_service/300831/display/img_version/9080327/t/1768465177/img_name/42011_300831_205b1ea57d.jpg" width="900"/>

Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading (×2 across article pages)

<body> <style>v\:image { behavior:url(#default#VML); display:inline-block }</style> <xml:namespace ns="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml" prefix="v"></xml:namespace> <style media="screen" type="text/css">

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1 (×2 across article pages)

<h2 class="title"> <a href="https://www.ka.no/sak/article/1872553"> Viktig pensjonsseier for menighetsbarnehagene </a> </h2>

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<a class="logo" href="/"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer' (×40 across article pages)

<a class="read-more-link" href="https://www.ka.no/sak/article/1872553">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

<input class="system-search-input-box" has_input="0" id="view_3404523____q" name="view_3404523____q" onblur="if (this.value== '') { $(this).attr('has_input', 0); } " onfocus="systemFocus(this);$(this)
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible (×6 across article pages)

<a class="ui-button-search icon-search" href="" id="view_3404523____submit_link" onclick="if (window.top.$('#view_3404523____q').attr('has_input') != 1) { return false; };systemSubmitElements(this, 'c
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable (×2 across article pages)

<div onclick="Cs.toolbar.show();" onmouseout="this.style.backgroundImage='url(https://d1nizz91i54auc.cloudfront.net/_static/images/toolbar_cube_flat.svg)';" onmouseover="this.style.backgroundImage='ur
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element has onmouseover without keyboard equivalent (×2 across article pages)

<div onclick="Cs.toolbar.show();" onmouseout="this.style.backgroundImage='url(https://d1nizz91i54auc.cloudfront.net/_static/images/toolbar_cube_flat.svg)';" onmouseover="this.style.backgroundImage='ur
Add keyboard event handlers (onfocus, onblur, onkeydown) for equivalent functionality
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element has onmouseout without keyboard equivalent (×2 across article pages)

<div onclick="Cs.toolbar.show();" onmouseout="this.style.backgroundImage='url(https://d1nizz91i54auc.cloudfront.net/_static/images/toolbar_cube_flat.svg)';" onmouseover="this.style.backgroundImage='ur
Add keyboard event handlers (onfocus, onblur, onkeydown) for equivalent functionality
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order (×358 across article pages)

<a class="item2" href="/om/dette-er-ka" role="menuitem" tabindex="1">Dette er KA</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation (×2 across article pages)

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler
